rules: Exactly one Owner exists at any time.
Every developer or AI Developer works through a task-specific access token.
No task executes without source, acceptance, assignment, and required lock coverage.
Owner verification revokes task access tokens and writes audit events.
Token budgets are tracked by task, sprint, developer, workstream, and version.

labels.name: ai-usage
labels.description: AI token usage and cost records

labels.name: multi-ai
labels.description: Multiple AI Developers or AI-assisted developers

labels.name: locking
labels.description: Task, file, folder, and workstream locks

milestones.title: v3.1.0 - Collaboration Identity and Role Model
milestones.goal: Allow multiple developers or AI Agents to work without overlap.

milestones.title: v3.2.0 - Single Owner and Owner Transfer
milestones.goal: Prevent top-authority conflict while allowing safe transfer.

issues.title: Add owner transfer audit log rules

milestones.title: v3.3.0 - Task Access Tokens Lifecycle
milestones.goal: Allow task-specific scoped work that expires when done.

issues.title: Add token issue and revoke commands design

milestones.title: v3.4.0 - Locks and Conflict Prevention
milestones.goal: Prevent task, file, folder, and risky parallel-work conflicts.

issues.title: Define task file folder workstream lock types

milestones.title: v3.5.0 - Assignment and Execution Governance
milestones.goal: Prevent AI Developers from working on unapproved or unassigned tasks.

issues.title: Add task assignment rules for multi developer work
Add backend frontend admin frontend task separation rules

milestones.title: v3.6.0 - AI Developer Sessions and Output Contracts
milestones.goal: Make AI output readable, reviewable, costed, and auditable.

milestones.title: v3.7.0 - Token Budgets and Cost Controls
milestones.goal: Prevent random AI token consumption and support pricing analytics.

issues.title: Add budget warning and approval rules

milestones.title: v3.8.0 - Owner Verify, Token Revocation, and Audit
milestones.goal: Close each task only after Owner verification and audit.

issues.title: Link owner verify to token revocation
Add owner rejection and reissue rules

milestones.title: v4.0.0 - Stable Multi-AI Governance Release
milestones.goal: Ship a strong governance model for AI-assisted team development.
